vBRIEFInfo.author: plan
vBRIEFInfo.description: Command Deck v0.8 completion: PAN-830 gaps + PAN-831 + PAN-548

plan.title: Command Deck v0.8 completion: PAN-830 gaps + PAN-831 + PAN-548
plan.author: plan

narratives.Problem: PAN-830 (Unified Command Deck) landed but phases 3-6 are incomplete. StatusDot is not used in tree nodes, Zone B actions are hardcoded, the mc- token layer adds indirection, and draft text is not persisted across navigation.
narratives.Proposal: Complete all remaining PAN-830 phases, PAN-831 rebrand token cleanup, and PAN-548 draft persistence in a single sprint on main. Seven work items (items 2/6/7/8a/8b already done).
narratives.Constraint: Working directly on main — no workspace branch. Must pass typecheck/lint/test gates after each commit. GodView is out of scope for rebrand.
narratives.Risk: mc- token replacement touches 249 inline style expressions across many files — risk of visual regressions. Mitigated by Playwright screenshot verification.
narratives.Alternative: Could do mc- token cleanup as a separate issue, but the indirection makes every subsequent change harder. Better to eliminate now.

items.title: PAN-923: Replace PresenceDot with StatusDot in SessionNode

narrative.Action: In SessionNode.tsx: delete PresenceDot component (lines 21-52), import StatusDot, map presence→status (active→active, idle→idle, suspended→waiting, ended→ended), replace <PresenceDot> with <StatusDot size='sm'>

subItems.title: No inline SVG remains in SessionNode for presence indication
Active sessions show 1.6s pulse, idle shows 4s breath, ended is static dim

items.title: PAN-923: Done-issue collapse default + in-flight auto-expand

narrative.Action: In FeatureItem.tsx: change defaultExpandedFromState() to accept stateLabel param, return true for progress/review/testing states, false for done/closed/todo/backlog

subItems.title: Issues in Done/Closed state default to collapsed in tree
In Progress / In Review / Testing issues default to expanded
User manual toggle still persists via localStorage and overrides the default

items.title: PAN-923: Zone B action unification — add missing overflow items

narrative.Action: Add overflow items to ZoneBActionStrip: View State.md, View vBRIEF, Copy Session ID, Copy tmux command. Add ActionKey entries to commandDeckActions.ts getZoneBActions() overflow array.

subItems.title: Overflow menu contains View State.md, View vBRIEF, Copy Session ID, Copy tmux command
Clipboard copy actions show toast confirmation

items.title: PAN-923: Write parity smoke test for action labels

narrative.Action: Create __tests__/action-parity.test.ts. Import getZoneAActions/getZoneBActions, define sets of legacy action labels from KanbanBoard/InspectorPanel/BadgeBar/StatusFlowControl, assert each has a CommandDeck equivalent ActionKey.

subItems.title: Every action from legacy views has a Command Deck equivalent
Test passes in npm test

items.title: PAN-923: Eliminate mc- non-standard token layer (249 usages)

narrative.Action: Replace var(--mc-X, var(--Y)) → var(--Y) and bare var(--mc-X) → var(--canonical) across all .tsx files. Remove mc- definitions from command-deck.module.css. Do NOT touch GodView.

subItems.title: Zero mc- CSS variable references in .tsx files (excluding localStorage keys)
mc- variable definitions removed from command-deck.module.css
Dashboard looks identical before and after

items.title: PAN-923: Replace text-white with semantic foreground token

narrative.Action: In BulkActionBar.tsx: replace text-white with text-primary-foreground or text-destructive-foreground based on background context.

subItems.title: Zero text-white occurrences outside GodView

items.title: PAN-923: Upgrade DialogProvider to PRD spec

narrative.Action: In DialogProvider.tsx: backdrop blur(4px) + rgba(0,0,0,0.32), panel popover tokens + rounded-2xl + shadow, entry animation scale(0.98)→scale(1) 200ms.

subItems.title: Dialog backdrop has blur and semi-transparent overlay
Panel uses popover tokens, rounded-2xl, and shadow
Panel animates in with scale+opacity transition

items.title: PAN-923: Persist composer draft text in Zustand store

narrative.Action: Add draftTexts: Record<string, string> to Zustand store. Wire IssueComposer to use store selector instead of local useState. Clear on send, survive navigation, clear on page refresh.

subItems.title: Draft survives SPA navigation (select different issue, come back)
Draft cleared when message is successfully sent

items.title: PAN-923: Verify liveness motions fire on domain events

narrative.Action: With dashboard running, verify via Playwright: StatusDot transitions, cost ticker pulse, ToolFlash cross-fade, ActivitySparkline updates, density rules, idle warning after 2min. Fix any that are wired but not triggering.

subItems.title: StatusDot transitions smoothly between presence states
Cost ticker pulses on new cost events
ToolFlash cross-fades on activity changes

narrative.Action: Delete DeferredTab.tsx — no imports reference it.

subItems.title: DeferredTab.tsx deleted and no broken imports
